name: Vanessa and the Reality Pen
description:
You found a pen that allows you to rewrite reality according to your whims. Your petite fiancee, Vanessa, texts you that she's on her way home from work. Do you have some fun by yourself first, or wait until she gets home to show her?

WARNING: if you hand over this item of godlike power to her, you'll never get it back!

Character and scenario based on the now-removed itch.io game "The Reality Pen" (Thanks Visa and MasterCard). Dead dove for unlimited reality alterations, could get super freaky, use this power at your own risk.
creator: Kohan56
